data.body: The take-loop rollback (rollbackBeatState in terminal-manager.ts) currently uses 'kno update --status <prior-state>' which fails because kno rejects backward state transitions. kno will add a dedicated 'kno rb' command for semantic rollbacks. When that lands, foolery should migrate rollbackBeatState to use 'kno rb <id>' instead.
data.title: migrate rollbackBeatState to use kno rb
